content.en:
"Who?"

Several half-step True Ancestors and many True Monarchs were extremely shocked, and they were ready to fight one by one, even Ye Tian was extremely dignified, and his divine sense continued to probe the surroundings, but he didn't find anything.

Everyone knew very well that no one else had entered the dojo before entering it.

But now, someone has sent a message to them, what does this mean?

"Could it be that there is a domain powerhouse who has survived until now?"

So the people guessed in their hearts.

It's not impossible!

At their level of cultivation, the lifespan is almost infinite, of course, there is actually a lifespan limit, but this lifespan limit is too long, and very few living beings can attain the day when they reach the end of their life.

The universe that this Domain Fragment has turned into is relatively young, and judging from the situation of the ruins, the time when the Domain Boundary was shattered is not very far away, so once someone escapes the pursuit and is accompanied by the Domain Fragment, it is really possible to survive all the time.

But.

Since the birth of the ruins, coupled with the casual evolution of the domain into the universe, there has been no strong appearance.

Therefore, in the hearts of many True Monarchs, the creatures of the Domain Realm Ruins should be wiped out.

But now, there was a voice at the ruins, which made their previous guesses seem to be wrong.

And Ye Tian thought more.

If someone really survived to the present and avoided the catastrophe of the destruction of the domain realm, it means that among the many ruins of the domain realm, there may be a terrifying powerhouse, or even a hidden Dao ancestor.

"The cold jade coffin I got earlier, is the woman inside alive or dead, what if it's alive?"

Ye Tian suddenly guessed.

But he didn't speculate too much on this aspect, because what was in front of him was more important.

The many True Monarchs did not move forward, but retreated, and if something really happened to them, they would evacuate here as soon as possible.

Rumble!!!!

The power of heaven and earth shakes!

In an instant, a large amount of heaven and earth power turned into a figure, and the figure gradually became clear, turning into an old man.

Seeing this old man, everyone was very vigilant, but they soon saw the reality of this old man.

"Spirit!"

Ye Tian also recognized it.

This old man is not a real living being, but a spirit similar to a machine spirit and a formation spirit.

"First of all, I want to introduce you, the old decay is the spirit of this dojo! You can call me Jiong!"

The old man introduced himself.

"Jiong, why didn't you show up in the medicine garden before, but after we came in, you suddenly appeared?"

Luohai Zhenjun asked.

Jiong smiled and said: "Strictly speaking, the medicine garden has been separated from the dojo, and although the old man is the spirit of the dojo, he can't control the medicine garden. Moreover, not all places in the dojo can be controlled by the decay, and some places are not even accessible to the decay!"

Seeing that Jiong didn't make a move, many Zhenjun gradually relaxed their vigilance and began to ask questions one by one, and Jiong was not annoyed and answered seriously.

At this time, Ye Tian also asked a more critical question-

"Elder Jiong, I wonder if anyone in the dojo has survived?"

Ye Tian's question also attracted the attention of others.

They are also very concerned about this issue, not that they don't want to ask, but they are worried that once they ask, they will know bad news.

So, they had been hesitating to ask this question, but they didn't expect Ye Tian to ask.

Jiong hesitated for a few seconds, the atmosphere seemed to freeze, and everyone was nervous.

Suddenly, Jiong sighed and said: "Actually, the old man doesn't know, there was a big battle that day, the master of the dojo led many disciples and the strong people of the dojo to meet the enemy, and soon after the news of the fall of the master of the dojo, there was a new enemy coming, and the other people in the dojo fled one after another, as for whether they survived in the end, the old man is not clear!"

Ye Tian didn't know if what Jiong said was true, but even if Jiong lied, they were helpless.

But at least one thing can be determined, that is, the threat of the dojo ruins should not be very big, otherwise Jiong would not have told them so much.

If you really want to be unfavorable to them, and the gap between the forces of the two sides is huge, Jiong can just start directly, there is no need to explain anything.

"Jiong Lao!" Luohai Zhenjun was also a little more polite, addressing each other as Jiong Lao, and said, "Since this dojo ruins have no owner, can we obtain the treasures and opportunities here?"

Jiong nodded and said: "Naturally, it is possible, those disciples were in a hurry to escape at the beginning, although they still took some things away, but they also left a lot of things, you can naturally take away these opportunities and treasures." However, I hope you don't destroy the buildings and things here, after all, this is the place where the old man lives, and it is also the old home!"

"Yes, we promise not to destroy this place!"

Many true monarchs answered.

Subsequently, under Jiong's introduction, everyone gradually learned what opportunities this dojo has.

This dojo is a dojo called the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor, the Red Dragon Dojo has four major opportunities: the martial arts field, the Dao Law Pavilion, the Red Dragon Pool, and the Heavenly Soul Tree, which are the four treasures that can be developed and controlled by Jiong, and everyone can enter them to obtain opportunities.

In addition to these four treasure lands, the Red Dragon Dojo itself also has many secret realms, but with the shattering of the domain realm, the connection between many secret realms and the Red Dragon Dojo has been cut off, and only one secret realm is still under the control of the Red Dragon Dojo.

As for what is the situation in the inner part of this secret realm, Lingjiong of the dojo is not very clear, because Jiong only controls the situation in the dojo, and the secret realm is not inside the dojo, but only has a connection with the dojo.

In addition, there are two places that are inaccessible to everyone, one is the residence of the owner of the dojo - the Red Dragon Pagoda.

The Red Dragon Pagoda is definitely the biggest chance treasure in the dojo, but even Jiong has no way to enter, and the prohibition there can even compete with the weaker Dao Ancestors, and they, the True Monarchs, who have not even stepped into the True Ancestors, naturally cannot break the prohibition and enter the Red Dragon Pagoda.

The second forbidden place is the Red Dragon Valley!

Red Dragon Valley is the residence of a red dragon, this red dragon is also the mount of the Red Dragon Daozu, the Red Dragon Daozu encountered this red dragon when he was very weak, and rose step by step with the help of its might, so he had the name of the Red Dragon Daozu, and this red dragon was also promoted to the rank of the Dao Ancestor with the help of the Red Dragon Daozu.

It can be said that the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor has two Dao Ancestor powerhouses!

Therefore, the Red Dragon Valley is also one of the forbidden places of the dojo, and even Jiong has no way to enter it.

But everyone knew very well that the Red Dragon Tower and the Red Dragon Valley were definitely the biggest opportunities for this dojo, but there was no way to enter them, and they were helpless.

It can even be said that if Ruojiong does not help them, they will not even be able to enter many buildings.

Just when many True Monarchs were looking forward to entering the dojo one building after another and obtaining those opportunities, Ye Tian pondered for a long time.

"Strange, even if the spirit of this dojo can't exert its strong strength, it can definitely control those prohibitions, if he doesn't want everyone to come in, even if Luohai Zhenjun has a pass token, it is estimated that he will not be able to enter. What is his purpose in helping these true monarchs in this way?"

Ye Tian was not suspicious, but felt that the spirit of the dojo would not do him any good by doing this!

He didn't believe that someone would be selfless, wasn't Ling afraid that these true monarchs would notify other strong people and finally dismantle the dojo?

Therefore, Ye Tian expected that the spirit of this dojo might have other plans, but he couldn't see it at the moment!
